hero.purpose: Splash screens, fullscreen player moments. The rarest, loudest voice.

section.purpose: Card headings, section labels — the most common display-font usage.

body.purpose: The only sentence-case text in the system; comfortable-reading paragraphs.

shadows.name: card
shadows.purpose: Rare case where a resting card needs to lift; most cards use zero shadow.

shadows.name: card-elevated
shadows.purpose: Modals, drawers, sheets — genuine overlays only.

shadows.name: gold-glow
shadows.purpose: Ambient glow to make the gold accent feel like it emits light, not a drop shadow.

motion.name: spring-press
motion.purpose: Press-in feedback on primary interactive elements — tactile, not a flat opacity fade.

motion.name: spring-entry
motion.purpose: Entrance animations (FadeInDown springify) for cards and zones.

motion.name: hover-transition
motion.purpose: Web-only hover lift + border tint on HoverCard.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Solid gold CTA — the one primary action per screen.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #FFC804; color: #0A0A0A; border: none; border-radius: 8px; min-height: 52px; padding: 0 24px; font-family: 'GrandisExtended', 'Poppins', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 2.5px; text-transform: uppercase; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; transition: transform 160ms; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.95); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #FFC804; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.4; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Transparent, bordered — one step quieter than primary.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: transparent; color: #EBEBEB; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07); border-radius: 8px; min-height: 48px; padding: 0 24px; font-family: 'GrandisExtended', 'Poppins', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 2.5px; text-transform: uppercase; transition: border-color 160ms, background-color 160ms; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #181818; border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.13); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #FFC804; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Premium Card
components.description: Default flat card — no shadow at rest, depth from surface color only.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #111111; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07); border-radius: 12px; padding: 16px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; } .ds-card-label { font-family: 'GrandisExtended', 'Poppins', sans-serif; font-size: 9px; letter-spacing: 1.8px; text-transform: uppercase; color: #888888; } .ds-card-value { font-family: 'GrandisExtended', 'Poppins', sans-serif; font-size: 32px; color: #FFC804; }

components.name: Gold Accent Card
components.description: The one sanctioned side-stripe exception — a consistent brand signature (Norman's chat messages, editorial highlights), not a repeated decorative accent.
components.html: Dijiste que dormirías 7 horas. Tu reloj marca 5.2 esta semana.
components.css: .ds-card-accent { display: flex; background: #111111; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07); border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-card-accent-stripe { width: 2px; background: #FFC804; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-card-accent-body { padding: 16px; color: #EBEBEB; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; }

components.name: Status Pill
components.description: Pill-shaped state indicator — tone communicates state, always paired with a text label.
components.css: .ds-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'GrandisExtended', 'Poppins', sans-serif; font-size: 9px; letter-spacing: 1.8px; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-pill-gold { background: rgba(255,200,4,0.12); color: #FFC804; } .ds-pill-muted { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07); color: #AAAAAA; } .ds-pill-success { background: rgba(82,168,120,0.15); color: #52A878; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item
components.description: Desktop sidebar navigation row — hover lift + gold focus ring via the shared HoverCard primitive.
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; min-height: 44px; padding: 11px 12px; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid transparent; color: #444444; font-family: 'GrandisExtended', 'Poppins', sans-serif; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 1.5px; text-decoration: none; position: relative; transition: transform 160ms, border-color 160ms, background-color 160ms; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: #222222; transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-nav-item:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #FFC804; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-nav-item-active { background: rgba(255,200,4,0.08); border-color: rgba(255,200,4,0.15); color: #FFC804; } .ds-nav-bar { position: absolute; left: -16px; width: 3px; height: 20px; background: #FFC804; border-radius: 999px; }

narrative.overview: Polaris is a cockpit, not a feed. Every screen behaves like an instrument panel for a 90-day high-performance protocol: a near-black canvas that recedes, a single gold needle that moves only when something earns it, and typography that reads like an operator's manual, not a lifestyle app. The system explicitly rejects the vocabulary of consumer wellness apps — no confetti, no badge-as-toy gamification, no mascots, no gradient hero metrics, no identical SaaS card grids. Gold is rationed: it marks the one primary action, the one key number, the one thing that changed.
keyCharacteristics: Near-black canvas, graphite cards, one gold accent used as a fill, never as ambient decoration.
GrandisExtended (uppercase) for anything that names or labels; Inter for anything meant to be read at length.
Flat by default — elevation exists only for things that float above the canvas.
Desktop composes its own layout instead of stretching the mobile column.

rules.name: The Fill-vs-Text Gold Rule
rules.body: gold is for fills only; gold-text is a separate, themeable token for gold-colored text/icons. Never cross the two.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Gold appears on a small minority of any given screen — one primary CTA, one score, one active nav item.

rules.name: The All-Caps Display Rule
rules.body: Every GrandisExtended usage is uppercase, no exceptions.

rules.name: The Floating-Only Rule
rules.body: Shadows are reserved for genuine overlays (modals, toasts); resting cards never cast a shadow.

dos: Do use palette.* tokens for every color; raw hex in a component is a tracked regression.
Do keep gold to fills only; use the separate gold-text token for gold-colored text or icons.
Do use spring-physics press feedback instead of instant opacity snaps.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion for every animation.
Do keep body text at Inter, 14px minimum, 4.5:1 contrast (WCAG AA).
donts: Don't use border-left/border-right as a decorative colored stripe anywhere except the one sanctioned Gold Accent Card.
Don't use gradient text for any metric or heading.
Don't build gamified streak/badge UI in the Duolingo mold.
Don't default to identical card grids as the answer to layout.
Don't add a shadow to anything in normal document flow.
Don't stack a second eyebrow convention on top of the existing uppercase section labels.
Don't stretch the mobile single-column layout to fill desktop width.
